{{Quote|Guests attending the famous and exclusive annual Marqua Spas Grand Ball were shocked when floubette artist Jantaa Binx strode onto the dance floor and began performing during the third course of the traditional Panelan feast.|A news report from Gailea by TriNebulon News|<ref name="GNN" />}}
'''Gailea''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE" /> located in the [[Gailea system/Legends|Gailea system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="TEA" /> It was the site of the location [[Femon (location)|Femon]]<ref name="GNN" /> and the [[Marqua Spas]],<ref name="CSWE" /> the latter of which hosted the renowned and exclusive [[Standard year/Legends|annual]] [[Marqua Spas Grand Ball]]. On the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] [[1 ABY/Legends|37:1:13]], a news report by [[TriNebulon News/Legends|TriNebulon News]] was issued from Femon that covered an incident where the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[floubette dance]] perfomer [[Jantaa Binx]] had begun performing at that year's Marqua Spas Grand Ball—only to be escorted off the Spas' premises due to the audience finding the interpretation by a Human of the traditionally [[Bird/Legends|avian]]-performed dance to be shocking and upsetting.<ref name="GNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Gailea was introduced by [[Paul Sudlow]] in the "[[Galaxywide NewsNets]]" feature of the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 9|ninth issue]] of [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'', which was published in [[February]] [[1996]].<ref name="GNN" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Gailea [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square M-12.<ref name="TEA" />
